counters.description: very strong in lane, can easily dodge your feathers with e and flash. if the lucian is good it is pretty much impossible to 1v1. play around your support to beat him. you outscale!
can use his speed up to dodge your feathers! extremely hard out damages you early. you outscale! fight with cc and chain your feathers with supports cc.
can ult to the other side of you and remove any chance of flash e to hit your feathers. try to win pre 6, and snowball.
outscales you, can cancel your autos with her invis, stopping you from getting feathers out, can easily dodge your feathers also. win early and snowball pre 6!
stops your feathers from passing through. play around his wall and all in when its on cooldown!
play around his windwall. your feathers dont disappear they are stopped at the windwall.
dashes are bad for xayah, and this champ has a dash on each auto..

synergies.description: xayah and rakan are made for each other...literally
his passive is perfect to chain cc, and you can get his passive off easily with your attack speed buff!
where lulu lacks in cc, she makes up for by making you a god
naut is broken, always be happy to have him on your team!
yuumi has great chase potential, which xayah lacks.
chase potential and his ult is great.
